scripts.food-banks: concurrently "npm run start:comondu" "npm run start:lapaz" "npm run start:loreto" "npm run start:mulege"
scripts.food-banks-lnx: concurrently "PORT=3001 DB_NAME=Comondu NODO_PREFIX=comondu DATABASE_URL=mysql://root:$DB_PASSWORD@localhost:3306/Comondu node index.js" "PORT=3002 DB_NAME=LaPaz NODO_PREFIX=lapaz DATABASE_URL=mysql://root:$DB_PASSWORD@localhost:3306/LaPaz node index.js" "PORT=3003 DB_NAME=Loreto NODO_PREFIX=loreto DATABASE_URL=mysql://root:$DB_PASSWORD@localhost:3306/Loreto node index.js" "PORT=3004 DB_NAME=Mulege NODO_PREFIX=mulege DATABASE_URL=mysql://root:$DB_PASSWORD@localhost:3306/Mulege node index.js"
scripts.prisma:generate:all: npm run prisma:generate:comondu && npm run prisma:generate:lapaz && npm run prisma:generate:loreto && npm run prisma:generate:mulege
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:comondu" "npm run start:lapaz" "npm run start:loreto" "npm run start:mulege"
